text: Iran strikes Qatar's Ras Laffan LNG facility — world's largest. QatarEnergy reports 'extensive damage.' Qatar immediately expels Iran's military attaches. War now directly hitting allied Gulf energy infrastructure.
Gabbard omitted from testimony that Iran was NOT rebuilding enrichment before war. Bloomberg caught discrepancy between written and spoken testimony. Major blow to war justification narrative.

USS Ford leaving Red Sea for Crete repairs after fire. Only Lincoln remains. Iran simultaneously hitting UAE (13 missiles, 27 drones), Saudi (4 missiles, 21 drones), and Qatar (Ras Laffan). Conflict fully regional.
8 non-Iranian vessels detected transiting Hormuz — nearly double recent days. Iran allowing 'permission-based transits to friendly countries.' Traffic still down ~97% overall.

IAEA reveals new underground enrichment site at Isfahan never inspected. Iran stockpile could fuel 9 nuclear weapons. Grossi: war has caused 'enormous degradation' but enrichment capabilities will likely survive.
Senate defeats Booker war powers resolution 53-47 for third time. Democrats pledge weekly votes. Gabbard told Senate Iran regime 'intact but largely degraded.'
Trump issues 60-day Jones Act waiver for foreign ships. Treasury eases Venezuela PDVSA sanctions. Analysts say combined gas price impact ~3 cents/gal.
UANI identifies 25 Iranian tankers in Gulf carrying ~20M barrels ($1B+ revenue for IRGC). 7 dark fleet tankers heading to Malaysia for China-bound transfers.
Fed holds rates at 3.5-3.75%. Dow crashes 768 points. Hot PPI at 0.7%. Only 1 cut projected for 2026. Markets fear stagflation.
Riyadh emergency meeting of 10+ Arab/Islamic FMs convenes without US. Missile alerts sound in Saudi capital during session. Germany's Merz openly criticizes war.
Speaker Johnson says 'mission just about accomplished' but Hormuz 'dragging it out.' WFP warns 45M more could face acute hunger if war continues through June.
Trump declares 'NO MORE' Israeli strikes on South Pars but threatens US will 'massively blow up' the entire field if Iran hits Qatar again. Axios: Trump DID coordinate original strike with Netanyahu.
Ras Laffan struck SECOND time in 12 hours — QatarEnergy reports 'sizeable fires and extensive further damage' to multiple LNG facilities. Qatar's LNG output halted since March 2.
Iran fires 6+ ballistic missile salvos at Israel overnight with cluster warheads. Foreign worker killed at Moshav Adanim. 5 injured in Jaljulia direct hit. IRGC framing as sustained 'punishment.'
Asian markets crash Thursday open — Nikkei -2.7%, KOSPI -2.6%, Hang Seng -1.4%. Brent breaks $110. Dubai crude hits all-time high $150+ for Asian buyers. Goldman revising target to $130.
FBI investigating Joe Kent for classified leaks. Saudi FM: 'trust in Iran completely shattered,' reserves right to military action. 12-nation Riyadh statement demands Iran halt attacks.
Confirmed: IDF struck Bandar Anzali naval base on the Caspian Sea — first-ever Israeli strike in northern Iran. 4 missile boats and corvette destroyed. Targeting Iran-Russia supply lifeline.

BREAKING: Iran has now struck energy infrastructure in ALL 6 GCC countries simultaneously. Ras Laffan extensive damage, SAMREF in Yanbu hit, 2 Kuwaiti refineries ablaze, Habshan shut down. Unprecedented regional escalation.

Satellite imagery shows 4 gas treatment plants at South Pars/Asaluyeh completely offline. Major fires visible from space. Iran's gas output likely cut by 30-40% — will affect domestic heating and electricity.

Pentagon $200B supplemental is extraordinary — more than every country's annual defense budget except the US itself. Combined with existing $1T budget, US military spending approaches $1.2T annualized.
IMO talks on safe maritime corridor started yesterday — first formal attempt to reopen Hormuz. Only 21 tankers have transited since Feb 28 vs 100+/day pre-war. 500+ tankers still trapped in the Gulf.

DNI Gabbard testimony bombshell: Iran's nuclear enrichment was 'obliterated' in June 2025 and they weren't rebuilding. Mojtaba Khamenei confirmed 'severely injured.' This contradicts the administration's stated war rationale.

Qatar has expelled Iran's military and security attaches, giving them 24 hours to leave. Saudi Arabia says trust in Iran is 'completely shattered.' Gulf states turning hostile to Iran despite opposing the US/Israeli war.
